def negative_dict_items_or_keys_materialized_in_loop():
    rule_id = "dict_items_or_keys_materialized_in_loop"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "dict.items(), keys(), or values() are repeatedly materialized inside loops."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
